title: Are your support and project teams working in silos?

posts.author: sa07chin (Sachin Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
We recently built the ServiceNow Connector for monday.com to help IT and ops teams stay in sync — no more manual updates or switching between tools.

Bi-directional sync
Custom field mapping
Real-time visibility into tickets and tasks

How do you currently manage service requests and project tracking? Could this app help unify your workflow?

Check it out: ServiceNow Connector

#mondaydotcom #ServiceNow #ITSM #teamcollaboration
